allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\Projects\\Smart-Waste-Management-System-Platform" -Force | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Force | Select-Object @{Name='Path';Expression={$_.FullName.Replace\('d:\\Projects\\Smart-Waste-Management-System-Platform\\',''\)}}, @{Name='Type';Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'DIR'}else{'FILE'}}} } else { $_ | Select-Object @{Name='Path';Expression={$_.FullName.Replace\('d:\\Projects\\Smart-Waste-Management-System-Platform\\',''\)}}, @{Name='Type';Expression={'FILE'}} } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse "d:\\Projects\\Smart-Waste-Management-System-Platform" -Directory -Force | Where-Object { $_.FullName.Split\('\\'\).Count -le 6 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { "DIR:  $_" }; Get-ChildItem -Recurse "d:\\Projects\\Smart-Waste-Management-System-Platform" -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { "FILE: $_" } | head -100)
